originContent: 自用的 Surge 规则、脚本和模块
translatedContent: Reglas, scripts y módulos de Surge para uso personal

originContent: [General.conf](https://github.com/BlueGrave/Surge/blob/master/General.conf) 参考 [@scomper](https://github.com/scomper/Surge) 和 [@DivineEngine](https://github.com/DivineEngine/Profiles/tree/master/Surge) 的配置文件注释
translatedContent: [General.conf](https://github.com/BlueGrave/Surge/blob/master/General.conf) Referencia los archivos de configuración comentados de [@scomper](https://github.com/scomper/Surge) y [@DivineEngine](https://github.com/DivineEngine/Profiles/tree/master/Surge)

originContent: - [AppleOS_Update.list](https://github.com/BlueGrave/Surge/blob/master/Ruleset/AppleOS_Update.list) 结合多个大佬的相关规则整理出来的各 Apple OS OTA 规则
translatedContent: - [AppleOS_Update.list](https://github.com/BlueGrave/Surge/blob/master/Ruleset/AppleOS_Update.list) Reglas OTA para Apple OS combinadas y organizadas a partir de varios expertos

originContent: - [Mail.list](https://github.com/BlueGrave/Surge/blob/master/Ruleset/Mail.list) 解决 iOS Mail App 收件问题
translatedContent: - [Mail.list](https://github.com/BlueGrave/Surge/blob/master/Ruleset/Mail.list) Soluciona problemas de recepción en la app iOS Mail

originContent: - [MyMoneyPro.sgmodule](https://github.com/BlueGrave/Surge/blob/master/Module/MyMoneyPro.sgmodule) 屏蔽随手记专业版 App 开屏广告
translatedContent: - [MyMoneyPro.sgmodule](https://github.com/BlueGrave/Surge/blob/master/Module/MyMoneyPro.sgmodule) Bloquea los anuncios de apertura de la app MyMoneyPro

originContent: - [WhiteList.sgmodule](https://github.com/BlueGrave/Surge/blob/master/Module/WhiteList.sgmodule) 排除 AdBlock 误伤，增加一些自用的特殊规则
translatedContent: - [WhiteList.sgmodule](https://github.com/BlueGrave/Surge/blob/master/Module/WhiteList.sgmodule) Excluye bloqueos erróneos de AdBlock y añade reglas especiales para uso personal

originContent: - [Cookie.sgmodule](https://github.com/BlueGrave/Surge/blob/master/Module/Cookie.sgmodule) 和 [Task.sgmodule](https://github.com/BlueGrave/Surge/blob/master/Module/Task.sgmodule) 自用的各 App 每日签到
translatedContent: - [Cookie.sgmodule](https://github.com/BlueGrave/Surge/blob/master/Module/Cookie.sgmodule) y [Task.sgmodule](https://github.com/BlueGrave/Surge/blob/master/Module/Task.sgmodule) Firmas diarias personalizadas para varias apps

originContent: - [VIFOnly.sgmodule](https://github.com/BlueGrave/Surge/blob/master/Module/VIFOnly.sgmodule) 开启兼容模式，避免 App 提示使用代理
translatedContent: - [VIFOnly.sgmodule](https://github.com/BlueGrave/Surge/blob/master/Module/VIFOnly.sgmodule) Activa modo compatible para evitar alertas de proxy en apps
